reason: audit-only mode; no source edits approved

summary: Added shared command-specific bench flag, duplicate scalar, missing value, boolean value, and positional validation before dispatch.
Added safe bench eval-run robot dry-run path that invokes the runner synchronously and returns eval-dry-run-summary.v1 instead of launching detached work.
Added did-you-mean hints for close command and flag typos.
Added eval-error.v1 JSON stderr envelopes for runner robot-mode argument and suite/matrix failures.
Added case-generation-result.v1 validate/promote envelopes, schema pinning, and earlier generator numeric argument validation.
Removed POOLSIDE_TOKEN-dependent robot dry-run output and pinned the deterministic dry-run summary schema.
Added bounded, filterable bench eval-runs output via --status, --running, --limit, and --json-lines so agents can inspect run state without consuming the full run corpus.
Accepted top-level --help and global --json/--no-color as no-op discovery conventions for the already-JSON bench CLI, including commandless multi-global invocations and bespoke parser paths.
Added --flag=value parsing to generic and bespoke bench parsers while preserving boolean-value rejection and duplicate-scalar validation.
Standardized bench-owned CLI errors on bench-error.v1 with status and exit_code while preserving existing wrapped subprocess schemas.
Promote now writes suite JSON via temp-file plus atomic replace, removes temp files during rollback, and bounds post-promote dry-run replay with the existing validator timeout.
repo-check-result.v1 payloads now include optional failure_kind, exit_code, and next_commands fields while preserving the v1 schema version.
bench eval-runs now supports --running, --status, and --limit filters, and detached eval-run sidecars include next_commands plus volatile field metadata.

gen_eval_cases.py now resolves --skill as either a repo skill name or a filesystem path, imports missing external skill directories into skills/<name>, and accepts SKILL.md file paths as parent-directory aliases.
True zero-case skills now infer bootstrap context for generation as well as validate/promote, avoiding the previous no-loadable-eval-cases failure before candidate synthesis could start.
Path-mode import copies the full skill directory, preserves supporting files such as references/, and records resolved skill/source/import metadata in generation config and report outputs.
Bench command help, capabilities, README examples, and workbench docs now advertise eval-case-generate --skill <name-or-path>, with skill-directory path as the primary first-run bootstrap form.

External prompt-style skills that import successfully but lack validate_*.ts now receive a synthetic .laguna/<skill>.json output contract, schema, and validator on the imported repo copy, verified against a philip-style fixture and a real philip temp-checkout smoke.
Generator LM setup now catches missing-key RuntimeError and emits a clean setup error plus next actions instead of a Python traceback; verified with an external philip path smoke.
